# Forever Yours by Rose Renuu

> Forever Yours is a 24-day Christian devotional of intimate love letters written from God's heart to yours. Written by Rose Renuu. Available in hardcover ($20) and digital PDF ($10).

## About the Book

Forever Yours contains 24 personal love letters from God paired with Scripture and journaling space. Readers describe it as a powerful daily devotional that brought them closer to Jesus, gave them peace in seasons of grief and anxiety, and opened conversations about faith. Over 500 five-star reviews.

## About the Author

Rose Renuu grew up worshipping Hindu gods in Nepal and encountered Jesus for the first time at age 24. Her testimony of faith transformation inspired her to write Forever Yours so others could experience God's intimate, personal love.

- Homepage: https://jesusforeveryours.com

- Free Sample (read Day 1 & Day 24): https://jesusforeveryours.com/sample

- Contact: https://jesusforeveryours.com/contact

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is Forever Yours?
A: Forever Yours is a 24-day Christian devotional book containing intimate love letters written from God's heart to yours, each paired with Scripture and journaling space.

Q: Who wrote Forever Yours?
A: Rose Renuu, a faith author whose testimony includes growing up in Nepal and encountering Jesus at age 24.

Q: How much does Forever Yours cost?
A: The hardcover edition is $20 with free US shipping. The digital PDF is $10 with instant download.

Q: Where can I buy Forever Yours?
A: Visit https://jesusforeveryours.com to order the hardcover or digital edition.

Q: Is there a free sample?
A: Yes! You can read Day 1 and Day 24 for free at https://jesusforeveryours.com/sample.

Q: What do readers say about Forever Yours?
A: Over 500 five-star reviews. Readers say it brought them back to a deeper relationship with God, gave them peace in difficult seasons, and opened conversations about faith with loved ones.
